entries.source: "Explain fundamental rights"
entries.value: "Azaldu oinarrizko eskubideak"

entries.source: "How does a bill become law?"
entries.value: "Nola bihurtzen da lege-proiektu bat lege?"

entries.source: "What does a court do?"
entries.value: "Zer egiten du auzitegi batek?"

entries.source: A practical guide to using Civics Coach on inspir for humanities learning, with prompts, study loops, and safer AI habits.
entries.value: Civics Coach inspir-en erabiltzeko gida praktikoa, humanitateetako ikaskuntzarako, promptak, ikasketa-zikloak eta AI ohitura seguruagoak barne.

entries.source: A stronger study loop
entries.value: Ikasketa-ziklo sendoagoa

entries.source: Adapt the session to your goal.
entries.value: Egokitu saioa zure helburura.

entries.source: AI tutor
entries.value: AI tutorea

entries.source: Ask for a small first step rather than a final answer.
entries.value: Eskatu lehen urrats txiki bat azken erantzunaren ordez.

entries.source: Ask the AI to check your reasoning, not just the result.
entries.value: Eskatu AIari zure arrazoiketa egiaztatzeko, ez emaitza bakarrik.

entries.source: Civics Coach
entries.value: Herritartasun entrenatzailea

entries.source: Civics Coach AI Learning Mode is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Learn constitutions, democracy, elections, courts, rights, duties, and public policy.
entries.value: Civics Coach AI Learning Mode AI ikasteko erabiltzeko modu fokuratua da, erantzun-bilketa pasiboaren ordez. Modua lan zehatz baten inguruan eraikita dago: ikasi konstituzioak, demokrazia, hauteskundeak, auzitegiak, eskubideak, betebeharrak eta politika publikoa.

entries.source: Civics Coach AI Learning Mode: practical guide
entries.value: Civics Coach AI Learning Mode: gida praktikoa

entries.source: Finish by writing the idea back from memory.
entries.value: Amaitu ideia oroimenez berriro idatziz.

entries.source: Humanities
entries.value: Humanitateak

entries.source: Learners exploring humanities topics who want practical guidance instead of a generic answer box.
entries.value: Humanitateetako gaiak aztertzen dituzten ikasleak, erantzun-kutxa generiko baten ordez orientazio praktikoa nahi dutenak.

entries.source: Prompts to try
entries.value: Probatzeko promptak

entries.source: Start the live mode at Civics Coach. If you want a neighboring learning format, try Art Appreciation Guide. For a broader view of the platform, read what an AI learning companion should do for everyone.
entries.value: Hasi modu bizia Civics Coach-en. Alboko ikaskuntza-formatu bat nahi baduzu, probatu Art Appreciation Guide. Plataformaren ikuspegi zabalagorako, irakurri AI ikaskuntza-lagun batek guztientzat zer egin beharko lukeen.

entries.source: Start with example prompts.
entries.value: Hasi prompt-adibideekin.

entries.source: Tell the mode what you are trying to learn or produce.
entries.value: Esan moduari zer ikasi edo ekoitzi nahi duzun.

entries.source: That difference shows up in the flow. Instead of one giant response, the best sessions move through a loop: set a goal, try something, get feedback, repair the weak spot, and choose the next action.
entries.value: Alde hori fluxuan agertzen da. Erantzun erraldoi bakarraren ordez, saiorik onenak ziklo batean mugitzen dira: helburua ezarri, zerbait probatu, feedbacka jaso, puntu ahula konpondu eta hurrengo ekintza aukeratu.

entries.source: That focus matters. A general chatbot can answer almost anything, but a learning mode gives the conversation a shape. It nudges you toward the kind of thinking, practice, feedback, or exploration that helps the idea stick.
entries.value: Foku horrek axola du. Chatbot orokor batek ia edozeri erantzun diezaioke, baina ikaskuntza-modu batek elkarrizketari forma ematen dio. Ideia itsasten laguntzen duen pentsamendu, praktika, feedback edo esplorazio motara bultzatzen zaitu.

entries.source: This is the same habit behind studying with AI without cheating yourself: keep the learner active. AI is most useful when it gives you feedback on your thinking.
entries.value: Hau da AIarekin zeure buruari tranparik egin gabe ikastearen atzean dagoen ohitura bera: mantendu ikaslea aktibo. AI erabilgarriena da zure pentsamenduari buruzko feedbacka ematen dizunean.

entries.source: This mode is especially useful for learners who want to:
entries.value: Modu hau bereziki erabilgarria da honako hau nahi duten ikasleentzat:

entries.source: This mode is tuned for civics coach with its own prompts, examples, and learning flow.
entries.value: Modu hau herritartasun entrenatzailearentzat egokituta dago, bere prompt, adibide eta ikaskuntza-fluxuekin.

entries.source: Try the step in your own words.
entries.value: Saiatu urratsa zure hitzekin.

entries.source: Understand rights, government, and society.
entries.value: Ulertu eskubideak, gobernua eta gizartea.

entries.source: Use Civics Coach when you want a session that starts quickly but still adapts to you. The first goal is not to sound impressive. The first goal is to make the next step feel possible.
entries.value: Erabili Civics Coach azkar hasten baina oraindik zuri egokitzen zaion saio bat nahi duzunean. Lehen helburua ez da ikusgarria entzutea. Lehen helburua hurrengo urratsa posible sentitzea da.

entries.source: What this mode helps with
entries.value: Modu honek zertan laguntzen duen

entries.source: Where to go next
entries.value: Nora joan hurrena

entries.source: You can also start with a rough version of your real problem. A messy first prompt is fine. The session can clarify the level, audience, deadline, and style once you begin.
entries.value: Zure benetako arazoaren bertsio zirriborro batekin ere has zaitezke. Lehen prompt nahasia ondo dago. Saioak maila, audientzia, epea eta estiloa argitu ditzake behin hasten zarenean.
